name: lifebot
description: Lifebot MVP 1 desktop aquatics operations assistant

scripts.build:web: npm run frontend:build --workspace apps/desktop && cargo build -p lifebot-web-server --release
scripts.test: cargo test -p lifebot-core -p lifebot-policies -p lifebot-assistant-tools -p lifebot-sling-mock -p lifebot-messaging -p lifebot-openclaw-adapter && npm run test --workspace apps/desktop
